title: No More Trading Halls
description: Tired of endless hours of cycling villager trades? With this datapack, you can actually explore for your enchantments!
body:
<details>
<summary>Locations for all enchanted books:</summary>

Aqua Affinity: Buried Treasure

Bane of Arthropods: Abandoned Mineshaft chests 

Blast Protection: Desert Temple

Channeling: Underwater Ruins Archaeology

Curse of Binding: Woodland Mansion

Curse of Vanishing: Woodland Mansion

Depth Strider: Shipwrecks

Efficiency: Mineshafts

Feather Falling: End Cities

Fire Aspect: Bastions

Fire Protection: Ruined Portals

Flame: Nether Fortresses

Fortune: Desert Archeology

Frost Walker: Igloos

Impaling: Underwater Ruins Archeology

Infinity: Strongholds

Knockback: End Cities

Looting: Trail Ruins

Loyalty: Underwater Ruins Archeology

Luck of the Sea: Fishing

Lure: Fishing

Mending: Ancient Cities

Multishot: Pillager Outposts

Piercing: Pillager Outposts

Power: Villages (rare) and Bastions

Projectile Protection: Jungle Temple

Protection: Villages (rare) and Bastions

Punch: End Cities

Quick Charge: Pillager Outposts

Respiration: Ocean Ruins

Riptide: Underwater Ruins Archeology

Sharpness: Villages (rare) and Bastions

Silk Touch: Mineshafts

Smite: Dungeons

Sweeping Edge: Villages

Thorns: Desert Temples

Unbreaking: Villages

</details>


<details>
<summary>Crafting Recipes for all enchanted books:</summary>

Protection:


![Recipe: Bottle o' Enchanting, Armadillo Scute, Leather Tunic, Book, to craft Protection 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3ccd317e0abfef6fedd99fb0f5e8b6f6d87db30.png)


Blast Protection:


![Recipe: Bottle o' Enchanting, TNT, Leather Tunic, Book, to craft Blast Protection 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce82cfe95a59cfae4a3734e7a81bfc81c51f7c67.png)


Projectile Protection:


![Recipe: Bottle o' Enchanting, Arrow, Leather Tunic, Book, to craft Projectile Protection 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1eb6dad600510d105d3d9fbb5e5d52c9363dbbc6.png)


Fire Protection:


![Recipe: Bottle o' Enchanting, Fire Charge, Leather Tunic, Book, to craft Fire Protection 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36178e65c3c3a15053621b9ec50a6d29b89436e8.png)


Sharpness:


![Recipe: Bottle o' Enchanting, Amethyst Shard, Wooden Sword, Book, to craft Sharpness 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3206eebbe1eb7081018cbdf67b7c9d2f4f6d622d.png)


Power:


![Recipe: Bottle o' Enchanting, Amethyst Shard, Bow, Book, to craft Power 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a69ea8ec7fa439354247ef6219ead5948e06eb08.png)


Efficiency:


![Recipe: Bottle o' Enchanting, Amethyst Shard, Wooden Pickaxe, Book, to craft Efficiency 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecb2cb9bc88b706f0ba0c5093fe3fdc633c7940a.png)


Unbreaking:


![Recipe: Bottle o' Enchanting, Iron Ingot, Crafting Table, Book, to craft Unbreaking 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11cdee5684fd4c19c5af8146d982b40b680d5a6b.png)

</details>

Have fun exploring and _not wasting hours of your life_ cycling villager trades!
